name: New Industrial Corridor
description: Model the environmental cost of expanding industrial activity alongside existing urban pressure.
objective: Evaluate how industrial growth shifts pollution, heat, and ecological risk across the system.
product_focus: Helps planners weigh economic development against long-term resilience costs.

name: Road Expansion Plan
description: Test the environmental tradeoffs of roadway expansion and related land-use pressure.
objective: Compare transport capacity gains against rising congestion, heat, and green-space loss.
product_focus: Helps municipalities assess whether road-led growth creates hidden environmental liabilities.

name: Green Restoration Plan
description: Explore how a restoration-led plan improves resilience in vulnerable zones.
objective: Estimate how green infrastructure and habitat restoration change long-term environmental performance.
product_focus: Helps planning teams justify restoration investment with measurable system benefits.

name: Transit-First Redevelopment
description: Test whether cleaner mobility plus urban greening outperforms road-first redevelopment.
objective: Assess whether lower-impact redevelopment improves sustainability while limiting future risk.
product_focus: Helps cities compare transit-led mitigation with more conventional expansion plans.

name: Deforestation Crisis
description: Show how rapid tree loss changes biodiversity, heat, and ecological recovery.
objective: Teach how forest loss affects habitat stability and environmental resilience.
product_focus: Helps students connect tree cover to biodiversity and heat regulation.

name: Urban Heat Island
description: Demonstrate how traffic, pollution, and reduced green space intensify city heat stress.
objective: Teach why dense urban zones can trap heat and accumulate environmental stress.
product_focus: Helps classrooms explain the links between traffic, emissions, and urban temperature.

name: Coastal Pollution Stress
description: Explore how pollution shock affects a coastal zone over time.
objective: Teach how pollution can disrupt coastal ecosystem stability and raise future risk.
product_focus: Helps learners connect pollution events to long-term ecosystem decline.

name: Restore the Ecosystem Challenge
description: Challenge learners to use restoration actions to improve sustainability in stressed zones.
objective: Teach how restoration can offset some environmental damage, even in high-stress areas.
product_focus: Helps students experiment with recovery strategies and compare outcomes.
